array.string: INBOX="/Users/ckasten/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/Fathom Meeting Notes"; PROCESSED="$INBOX/processed"; SCRIPT="/Users/ckasten/Scripts/FormatFathomNotes.applescript"; mkdir -p "$PROCESSED"; found=0; for f in "$INBOX"/*.txt; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; found=1; echo "[$(date)] Processing: $f"; if /usr/bin/osascript "$SCRIPT" "$f"; then mv "$f" "$PROCESSED/"; echo "[$(date)] Done: $(basename "$f")"; else echo "[$(date)] FAILED: $f"; fi; done; [ $found -eq 0 ] && echo "[$(date)] Tick - no files"
